en: Hello everyone, welcome to your channel Smartify. Today we will learn vocabulary with tricks
and mnemonics. And today's word is sluggish. It means moving or working more slowly than
normal in a way that seems lazy. Now, we can simply remember it by slow plus ish, relate
lazy with slowness or we can relate slew with slow and ghish with ghis. For example, veh
itna aalsi hain ki hamesha pyaar slowly ghis ghis kar chalta hain. See this bear now. It
is sluggish in its movements. Thanks for watching. Please like, share and subscribe for more
